title: [rootless] play kube not yet implemented
body:
/kind feature

**Description**

`podman play kube` isn't implemented for rootless yet.

**Describe the results you received:**
```
INFO[0000] running as rootless
ERRO[0000] rootless users: not yet implemented
```

@giuseppe I've read you're working on this?! I'd like to test it if you already have a branch there.
